scenario_title: Motor skills practice with stereotypic behaviors
minimal_context: The student is practicing catching a ball while standing on a spot in the gross motor area.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We finished jumping. Let's check the picture schedule. It says catch. Please stand on the spot.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Smiles and jumps up and down, looking really excited) Catch.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Kneels about 2 feet in front of the student) Hands out, look at the ball.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Catches the ball with two hands, then squeezes the ball)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Bounces on the ball, makes high pitch noises and flaps hands)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We finished jumping. Let's check the picture schedule. It says catch. Please stand on the spot.

STUDENT: (Smiles and jumps up and down, looking really excited) Catch.

TUTOR: (Kneels about 2 feet in front of the student) Hands out, look at the ball.

STUDENT: (Catches the ball with two hands, then squeezes the ball)

TUTOR: Okay, let's do that again.

STUDENT: (Bounces on the ball, makes high pitch noises and flaps hands)
